creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
www/netsurt needs libutf8proc

Installing libutf8proc-1.3.1.3...
pkg-static: libutf8proc-1.3.1.3 conflicts with utf8proc-2.1.0 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/lib/libutf8proc.so
*** Error code 70

libutf8proc.so is a dependency of devel/subversion.

I think everybody needs subversion. So netsurf is not installable.
